title: Data Structures & Algorithms Lab
description: Comprehensive lab covering fundamental data structures and algorithms including arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and dynamic programming.

title: Operating Systems Lab
description: Hands-on lab for operating system concepts including process management, memory management, and scheduling algorithms.

title: Advanced Algorithms Lab
description: Advanced algorithmic techniques covering dynamic programming, graph algorithms, greedy approaches, and divide & conquer.

title: Web Development Lab
description: Practical web development lab covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and data structure applications in frontend and backend systems.

title: Machine Learning Foundations Lab
description: Introductory ML lab covering linear algebra, probability, classification, regression, and neural network basics through coding exercises.

title: Competitive Programming Lab
description: Intensive competitive programming lab focused on contest strategy, speed coding, and advanced problem-solving techniques.

title: Database Management Systems Lab
description: Lab covering relational databases, SQL, normalization, indexing, and query optimization with hands-on coding assignments.

title: Data Structures Lab
description: Foundational data structures lab covering arrays, stacks, queues, trees, and sorting algorithms for first-year CS students.
